name: INEST, Inc.
summary: INEST, Inc. provides smart solutions in Japan. The company sells mobile phones, smart phones, and tablet terminals. It is also involved in the development, sale, operation, and maintenance of Web services. In addition, the company operates as an ASP for stores, such as drinking chains. Further, it operates Otoku Keitai.net, a mobile/smartphone sales site; a retrieval and reservation site to takeout; a visit reservation site; a site for parking reservation in sport and event venues, and airports; and a portal site to search and make reservations for mobile shops, as well as sells specialized digital signage for real estate and ASP remote monitoring systems. The company was formerly known as Universal Solution Systems Inc. INEST, Inc. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
